body: Task: Close the thin runtime-backed SSE publish path for task_update and approval_required at the API surface using the existing exact enriched builders plus current store/read-model seams rather than adding new domain truth. Success criteria: targeted API/SSE coverage no longer treats these families as runtime-gap-only, or you leave one precise blocker showing the remaining missing surface/store hookup. Relevant files: crates/cairn-api/src/sse_publisher.rs, crates/cairn-api/src/sse_payloads.rs, crates/cairn-api/tests/sse_payload_alignment.rs, crates/cairn-api/tests/migration_report_consistency.rs.
